2024-25 Valparaiso Beacons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-19 (6-14, 11th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Roger Powell

PS/G: 74.7 (148th of 364)

PA/G: 73.9 (238th of 364)

SRS: -2.90 (191st of 364)

SOS: -0.12 (138th of 364)

ORtg: 107.8 (170th of 364)

DRtg: 106.7 (239th of 364)
